Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to construct a logical skeleton process constraints for the scenario Provide a Python dictionary with keys equivalence alwaysbefore alwaysafter nevertogether activfreq directlyfollows We need to fill them with constraints derived from typical order fulfillment process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: RO always before CA receive before check availability CA always before RI RI before PI PI before QC QC before PO PO before GSL GSL before D D before IC IC before RP So we can set order constraints each subsequent step always before next one

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: equivalence constraints maybe some activities have same number of occurrences For example Pick Items equals Quality Check similarly Pack Order equals Generate Shipping Label equivalence between PI and QC PO and GSL

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity occurrences each activity occurs either 0 or 1 times in a case per order Typically each order will have exactly one occurrence of each step unless something fails and loops We can set each to 01

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Directlyfollows constraints For each adjacent pair the second directly follows the first Never together maybe no two activities that cannot coexist Could set no nevertogether constraints empty set

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Always before If first activity occurs then the second activity should have been executed previously That is second before first So we may want to encode that each activity has its predecessor executed before it alwaysbefore set could be CA RO meaning if CA occurs RO before it

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: alwaysbefore set of tuples RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP but corrected to CA RO RI CA PI RI QC PI PO QC GSL PO D GSL IC D RP IC Alwaysafter RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP

Name: Validation - PE
Text: produce dictionary equivalence PI QC PO GSL alwaysbefore CA RO RI CA PI RI QC PI PO QC GSL PO D GSL IC D RP IC alwaysafter RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP IC directlyfollows RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP activfreq all RO CA RI PI QC PO GSL D IC RP 01 nevertogether set
